## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 122, Safari 17]
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, MacBook Pro M2]
- URL where it happened: [e.g. /app/cards, /onboard]
- Account type: [e.g. personal, business — please do NOT share account numbers or PII]

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (cannot use the app)
- [ ] High (broken feature, workaround exists)
- [ ] Medium (cosmetic / minor)
